Package io.forja.components.overlays.fxDialog

Class FxDialog

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
io.forja.components.overlays.fxDialog.FxDialog
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxDialog extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
A modal dialog rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.

FxDialog is a StackPane containing a translucent scrim (which absorbs clicks) and a centered panel VBox with a title header, a body slot, and a footer row of action buttons. Show and dismiss with show(Scene) / close().

Builder usage:

     
      FxDialog d = FxDialog.builder()
          .title("Rename project")
          .body(nameField)
          .footer(cancelButton, saveButton)
          .build();
      d.show(scene);
See Also:
  • OverlayHost
  • FxDialog.Builder
